title: Sprint 54 Wave A: Track BlockPlaceSkippedEvent reasons as world facts
description: In AgentBackgroundService.ProcessEventsAsync, the BlockPlaceSkippedEvent handler currently just logs and calls MarkSkippedBlock. It should also store the skip reason as a world fact (e.g., build:{blueprintId}:block:{index}:skipReason = "occupiedBy_stone" or "botPosition") so that BuildStallDetail() and LlmEvaluatorImpl can report it. This requires extracting blueprintId and blockIndex from the correlated PlaceBlock context.
